indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed is a significant obstacle to setting up a computer workstation, as it takes up a large portion of the space and obstructs access to the window.

indicators.name: window
indicators.rationale: The window is partially obstructed by curtains, reducing the amount of natural light available for work and potentially creating a less comfortable working environment.

indicators.name: chandelier lighting
indicators.rationale: The chandelier lighting is too diffuse and lacks task illumination, which is crucial for screen work and can cause glare on the computer screens.

indicators.name: table
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface suitable for placing a laptop or keyboard, making it difficult to set up a computer workstation.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The presence of a bed and obstructed window reduce the available space and natural light, while the chandelier lighting lacks task illumination. There is no flat surface suitable for setting up a computer workstation, making it challenging to perform focused solo work in this environment.
